name: llm-coding-benchmark
description: A dependency-free harness for comparing coding-model responses.

scripts.test:c: npm run fixture:firmware:self-test && npm run fixture:ring-buffer:self-test && npm run fixture:parser:self-test
scripts.check: node --check run-benchmark.mjs && node --check run-repeats.mjs && node --check export-public-results.mjs && node --check summarize-repeats.mjs && node --check fixtures/firmware-state-machine/scripts/verify-reference.mjs && node --check fixtures/embedded-ring-buffer/scripts/verify-reference.mjs && node --check fixtures/binary-parser/scripts/verify-reference.mjs && node --check scripts/check-cross-compilation.mjs && node --check scripts/check-fixtures.mjs && node --check scripts/scan-secrets.mjs && node --check src/benchmark-cli.mjs && node --check src/cross-compilation.mjs && node --check src/fixtures.mjs && node --check src/harness.mjs && node --check src/models.mjs && node --check src/public-results.mjs && node --check src/scores.mjs && node --check src/statistics.mjs && node --check src/target-profiles.mjs && node --check src/providers/index.mjs && node --check src/providers/ncode.mjs && node --check src/providers/openai-compatible.mjs
